items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to the scenario of 'Graceful degradation when agent confused'. While the expected result mentions confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, there are no concrete traces or snapshots captured that demonstrate this outcome. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide relevant evidence to support the validation of this exploratory step.
